nasb.text: And the Lord appeared again at Shiloh, because the Lord revealed Himself to Samuel at Shiloh by the word of the Lord.

esv.text: And the Lord appeared again at Shiloh, for the Lord revealed himself to Samuel at Shiloh by the word of the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶和華又在示羅顯現，因為耶和華在示羅藉著他的話向撒母耳啟示自己。

ccb.text: 耶和华继续在示罗显现，用自己的话启示撒母耳。撒母耳把耶和华的话传遍了以色列。
